query:
SELECT nome, telefone FROM gestantes 
WHERE clinicaId = 60001 
AND telefone IS NOT NULL AND telefone != ''
AND id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY nome;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute SELECT nome, telefone FROM gestantes 
WHERE clinicaId = 60001 
AND telefone IS NOT NULL AND telefone != ''
AND id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL)
